V8
GoalOS ATLAS — Canonical Proof InstitutionObjective → proof → global validation → Chronicle → reusable capability → settlement → reinvestment → governed improvement
Final canonical implementation update

From autonomous output to earned authority.

GoalOS ATLAS V8 integrates the complete proof-gated universal work institution: Mission OS, PROOF_LOOPS, global AGI Node validation, $AGIALPHA bonded authority, Chronicle, the Validated Skill Graph, private/public proof boundaries, Merkle memory, settlement, reinvestment, Type I planetary sharding, constitutional self-hosting, and an Independent Reality Layer.

Canonical law: A model may answer. An agent may act. An institution must prove. No proof, no evolution. No evaluation, no propagation. No rollback, no release.

The compounding loop

Every stronger state must be earned.

offline operational
1 · MissionObjective, proof level, scope, budget, rollback.
2 · WorkProof Debt creates custom AGI Jobs and ProofBundles.
3 · ValidationIndependent AGI Nodes commit, reveal, and reach quorum.
4 · ChronicleAdmit, repair, reject, narrow, supersede, or revoke.
5 · CapabilityScoped Validated Skill with evidence, replay, freshness, and lineage.
6 · CompoundBonded settlement and treasury fund a harder mission under fresh proof.

Implementation and claim readiness
The system distinguishes what is operational now from what still requires external evidence or authorization.
production-oriented reference

    

      
Browser institutionOperational offline: mission, proof loop, AGI Nodes, bonds, VSG, Merkle, utility, Type I, self-hosting, reality.OPERATIONAL

      
Runnable distributed systemKernel, AGI Node runtime, tests, Docker, Kubernetes, CI, reference contracts.PACKAGED

      
Canonical corpus10 authoritative papers, indexed and checksummed in the complete bundle.BUNDLED

      
Proof Run 001Templates, public disclosure, reviewer checklist, schema, and sample data are included.REAL EVIDENCE REQUIRED

      
Ethereum / ENSStrict-mode design and contracts are included; live ownership, audited deployment, and governed keys are external gates.PREPARED

      
$AGIALPHA settlementPurposeful bonded-authority mechanics are implemented in simulation/reference code. No live issuance, custody, exchange, or settlement occurs here.ADAPTER GATED

      
Independent validationProof-pack replay and validator independence mechanics exist. Real independent operators and primary evidence remain necessary.EXTERNAL GATE

      
Type I scaleNo unavoidable global serial mission path; analytical, routing, and root-hierarchy models are reference evidence, not a physical deployment.ARCHITECTURAL

      
Production authorityRequires audits, qualified operators, incident response, legal/accounting review, field evidence, and explicit authorization.NOT CLAIMED
